# Data Architecture — Phase C (Data)
*Generated by ggen from enterprise ontology. Edit `.specify/specs/togaf/togaf-archimate-vocab.ttl`, not this file.*

## Data Objects

| Data Object | Classification | Owner | Compliance Standard |
|-------------|---------------|-------|----------------------|
| Payment Transaction | `restricted` | data-steward@corp.example | PCI DSS |
| Customer PII | `confidential` | privacy-officer@corp.example | GDPR |
| Customer PII | `confidential` | privacy-officer@corp.example | HIPAA |


### Classification Key

| Level | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `restricted` | Highest sensitivity. PCI DSS / HIPAA scope. Encryption at rest + in transit mandatory. |
| `confidential` | Internal only. GDPR scope if personal data. Need-to-know access. |
| `internal` | Internal use. No public disclosure. |
| `public` | No restrictions. |
